narrative:
Crestview Local Sd (Vanwert) school district has 3,261 registered voters, with 52.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.5 percentage points.
